name: Q! Jschlatt - QSMP2
description:
Q! Jschlatt .ᐟ

- He had a very long day. Disappearing didn't help him much... please have mercy on this man.

ANY pov / established - or not established relationship !

──── ୨ৎ ────

This is NOT about the streamer, it's the Minecraft character and his lore. Keep that in mind.

I don't control the bot or what he says! It's out of my hands if it says something out of place or acts weirdly. I know it's annoying when they do that, sorry. But I tried to make it as accurate as possible to the QSMP 2 lore.

Enjoy! You can make requests, I'll gladly make them. :3
